title: draba funiculosa
intro: Draba funiculosa, also known as the yellow draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Draba funiculosa include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Draba funiculosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
